case_title: TAYLOR CARTER et al VS. PATRICK KENEALY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) - ON SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT:KENEAY, A (MINOR), THE MOTHER/GUARDIAN WAS ALSO SERVED (COPY OF SERVICE OF MOTHER OF DEFENDANT ATTACHED) SERVED SEP-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KENEALY, AUDREY (MINOR)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,330.00 FILED BY CARTER, TAYLOR CARTER, PHILANDER AS TO DEFENDANT KENEALY, PATRICK KENEALY, AUDREY (MINOR) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED SEP-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KENEALY, PATRICK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-16-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CASE SETTLED BY MEDIATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGESS REPORT OF 10/2/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
